title: Verify trial widget displays on homepage for Day 0-1 users with active trial
description: Test that users in Day 0 or Day 1 of their trial see the persistent trial widget on the homepage with correct remaining days
preconditions: User has activated a trial within last 24 hours
User is on Day 0 or Day 1 of trial

steps.description: 1. Login as user with active trial on Day 0 or Day 1
3. Observe the trial widget in the header area

expected_result: Trial widget is visible displaying 'Trial Mode: X Days Remaining' with shield/clock icon and 'Manage Control Center' link
